'''âdh-b-l''' ('''kadhabal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:isekai|isekai]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:isekai|isekai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-b-l
|-
! Lemma
| kadhabal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhabal|thidhabal]] || [[word:jidhabal|jidhabal]] || [[word:shidhabal|shidhabal]] || [[word:kidhabal|kidhabal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhabal|thuthudhabal]] || [[word:jujudhabal|jujudhabal]] || [[word:shushudhabal|shushudhabal]] || [[word:kukudhabal|kukudhabal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhabal|thudhabal]] || [[word:judhabal|judhabal]] || [[word:shudhabal|shudhabal]] || [[word:kudhabal|kudhabal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhabal|thudhabal]] || [[word:judhabal|judhabal]] || [[word:shudhabal|shudhabal]] || [[word:kudhabal|kudhabal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhabal|thedhabal]] || [[word:jedhabal|jedhabal]] || [[word:shedhabal|shedhabal]] || [[word:kedhabal|kedhabal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhabal|thothodhabal]] || [[word:jojodhabal|jojodhabal]] || [[word:shoshodhabal|shoshodhabal]] || [[word:kokodhabal|kokodhabal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhabal|thodhabal]] || [[word:jodhabal|jodhabal]] || [[word:shodhabal|shodhabal]] || [[word:kodhabal|kodhabal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhabal|thodhabal]] || [[word:jodhabal|jodhabal]] || [[word:shodhabal|shodhabal]] || [[word:kodhabal|kodhabal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhabal|thĂŠdhabal]] || [[word:jĂŠdhabal|jĂŠdhabal]] || [[word:shĂŠdhabal|shĂŠdhabal]] || [[word:kĂŠdhabal|kĂŠdhabal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhabal|thathadhabal]] || [[word:jajadhabal|jajadhabal]] || [[word:shashadhabal|shashadhabal]] || [[word:kakadhabal|kakadhabal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhabal|thadhabal]] || [[word:jadhabal|jadhabal]] || [[word:shadhabal|shadhabal]] || [[word:kadhabal|kadhabal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhabal|thadhabal]] || [[word:jadhabal|jadhabal]] || [[word:shadhabal|shadhabal]] || [[word:kadhabal|kadhabal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhabal|shadhabal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhabal|goshadhabal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhabal|gokishadhabal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhabalnĂŒ|shadhabalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhabalnknĂŒ|goshadhabalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhabalnĂŒ|gokishadhabalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhabalshĂ«|shadhabalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkshĂ«|goshadhabalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhabalshĂ«|gokishadhabalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhabalro|shadhabalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkro|goshadhabalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhabalro|gokishadhabalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhabalmu|shadhabalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkmu|goshadhabalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhabalmu|gokishadhabalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhabalsher|shadhabalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhabalnksher|goshadhabalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhabalsher|gokishadhabalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhabalng|shadhabalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkng|goshadhabalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhabalng|gokishadhabalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhabalya|shadhabalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkya|goshadhabalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhabalya|gokishadhabalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhabalyam|shadhabalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkyam|goshadhabalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhabalyam|gokishadhabalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhabalnĂŒshĂ«|shadhabalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhabalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhabalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhabalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhabalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhabalnĂŒro|shadhabalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhabalnknĂŒro|goshadhabalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhabalnĂŒro|gokishadhabalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhabalnĂŒmu|shadhabalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhabalnknĂŒmu|goshadhabalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhabalnĂŒmu|gokishadhabalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhabalshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhabalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhabalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhabalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhabalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhabalshĂ«ro|shadhabalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkshĂ«ro|goshadhabalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhabalshĂ«ro|gokishadhabalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhabalshĂ«mu|shadhabalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkshĂ«mu|goshadhabalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhabalshĂ«mu|gokishadhabalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhabalronĂŒ|shadhabalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkronĂŒ|goshadhabalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhabalronĂŒ|gokishadhabalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhabalroshĂ«|shadhabalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkroshĂ«|goshadhabalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhabalroshĂ«|gokishadhabalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhabalromu|shadhabalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkromu|goshadhabalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhabalromu|gokishadhabalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhabalmunĂŒ|shadhabalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkmunĂŒ|goshadhabalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhabalmunĂŒ|gokishadhabalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhabalmushĂ«|shadhabalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkmushĂ«|goshadhabalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhabalmushĂ«|gokishadhabalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhabalmuro|shadhabalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhabalnkmuro|goshadhabalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhabalmuro|gokishadhabalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
